pi_items.source: Code analysis of examples/openproject_env/scripts/setup_openproject.sh which hardcodes the work package creation.
Task instruction and verifier.py logic check for this exact status name. Note: setup_task.sh destroys any pre-existing 'On Hold' statuses.
Task instruction and verifier.py logic check for this exact role. OpenProject 15 does not include 'Developer' by default, meaning the agent may need to create it.
Task instruction, verifier.py logic, and OpenProject default data definitions (common.yml) confirm 'Bug' is the intended and available type.

privileged_info_summary: The environment is seeded with synthetic data, including the project 'ecommerce-platform' and a work package titled 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari'. The agent must create a new status 'On Hold' and configure the workflow to allow the 'Developer' role to transition 'Bug' type work packages to this status. OpenProject's default basic data provides the 'Bug' type, but the 'Developer' role may need to be created.
